headlines: We Run Meta Ads That Convert.
hero.subtext: Digieonix is a performance-driven digital marketing agency helping businesses grow online — from Pakistan to the world.

faq.a: Yes! We serve clients in UK, USA, and beyond.

faq.a: Bank transfer, Wise, PayPal, and local Pakistani bank transfer.

narrative.title: A Performance-Driven Agency That Delivers Results
paragraphs: Digieonix was founded with one goal — to help businesses grow digitally without the fluff. We're a results-first agency that focuses on what matters: leads, sales, and ROI.
Based in Lahore, Pakistan, we work with clients across the UK, USA, and beyond — delivering world-class digital marketing services at competitive rates.
From Meta Ads to web development, SEO to social media — we're your full-stack digital growth partner.

values.title: Results First
values.description: We measure success in leads, sales, and ROI. Not vanity metrics.

values.title: Transparency
values.description: No hidden fees. No vague reports. You always know what's happening.

values.title: Client Success
values.description: Your growth is our growth. We treat every client like a long-term partner.

checklist: Dedicated account manager for every client

privacy.title: 1. Information We Collect
privacy.content: At Digieonix, we collect information that you provide directly to us, such as when you fill out a contact form, request a quote, or communicate with us via email or WhatsApp. This information may include your name, email address, phone number, and any other details you choose to provide.

privacy.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
privacy.content:
We use the information we collect to:
- Provide, maintain, and improve our digital marketing and web development services.
- Communicate with you regarding your projects, inquiries, and support requests.
- Send you technical notices, updates, and administrative messages.
- Analyze trends, usage, and activities in connection with our website.

privacy.title: 3. Data Security
privacy.content: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. However, please note that no method of transmission over the Internet or electronic storage is 100% secure.

privacy.title: 4. Sharing of Information
privacy.content: We do not sell, trade, or rent your personal identification information to others. We may share generic aggregated demographic information not linked to any personal identification information regarding visitors and users with our business partners and trusted affiliates.

privacy.title: 5. Third-Party Links
privacy.content: Our website may contain links to third-party websites. We are not responsible for the privacy practices or the content of those third-party sites. We encourage you to review the privacy policies of those websites before providing them with your personal information.

privacy.title: 6. Changes to This Privacy Policy
privacy.content: Digieonix reserves the right to update this privacy policy at any time. When we do, we will revise the updated date at the bottom of this page. We encourage Users to frequently check this page for any changes.

privacy.title: 7. Contact Us
privacy.content: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, the practices of this site, or your dealings with this site, please contact us at info@digieonix.com.

terms.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
terms.content: By accessing or using the services provided by Digieonix, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to all the terms and conditions of this agreement, then you may not access the website or use any of our services.

terms.title: 2. Services Rendered
terms.content: Digieonix provides digital marketing, social media management, search engine optimization (SEO), web development, and pay-per-click (PPC) advertising services. The specific scope, timeline, and cost of services will be outlined in a separate proposal or contract agreed upon by both parties.

terms.title: 3. Payment Terms
terms.content: Payment schedules will be detailed in your individual project contract. Unless otherwise specified, a 50% upfront deposit is required before the commencement of any project, with the remaining 50% due upon completion and before final delivery or launch.

terms.title: 4. Intellectual Property
terms.content: Upon full payment, the client retains the intellectual property rights to the final deliverables (e.g., website code, custom graphics). Digieonix reserves the right to use the completed work as part of our portfolio and for marketing purposes, unless a Non-Disclosure Agreement (NDA) has been signed.

terms.title: 5. Client Responsibilities
terms.content: The client agrees to provide all necessary materials, information, and approvals in a timely manner to ensure the smooth progress of the project. Delays on the client's end may result in corresponding delays in the project timeline.

terms.title: 6. Limitation of Liability
terms.content: In no event shall Digieonix, nor its directors, employees, partners, agents, suppliers, or affiliates, be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential or punitive damages, including without limitation, loss of profits, data, use, goodwill, or other intangible losses, resulting from your access to or use of or inability to access or use the Service.

terms.title: 7. Termination
terms.content: We may terminate or suspend access to our Service immediately, without prior notice or liability, for any reason whatsoever, including without limitation if you breach the Terms. All provisions of the Terms which by their nature should survive termination shall survive termination.
